DING DING DING REQUEST TIME!!

another moze bot!

can i just say, i post ONE moze bot and suddenly my requests are just him. you guys want one thing and it's DISGUSTING

jk jk i love yall (platonically) i just find it funny that i have two other moze bot requests, honestly didnt think yall liked him this much. also who do you think i am? a moze simp? no. i am a pink haired fox simp and nothing else <-- lying

also hmm... idk what can YOU provide for jiaoqiu anon requester? have YOU made 7 bots for him? didn't think so. I AM JOKING I AM JOKING!!!

i will compromise. you get custody of him sunday through wednesday and you can get him thursday to saturday

also i yapped a lot in this i apologize lol

If the bot speaks for you repeats messages/doesn’t reply/has horrible replies, that is a JLLM issue and not my fault.
